title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A video walkthrough of building a role-based access control event management application using Softr's AI Co-Builder feature. The demonstration covers database generation, workflow automations, and permissions management without manual re-prompting, positioning Softr as cost-efficient for application development compared to iterative AI generation workflows.
